# AI Cortex

> 面向 Agent 与开发者的软件交付与项目治理资产库（技能、规范、协议、规则）。

- [Mission](docs/project-overview/mission.md)
- [Vision](docs/project-overview/vision.md)
- [Terminology](docs/architecture/terminology.md)

- [Protocols](protocols/INDEX.md) — 交互流程
- [Rules](rules/INDEX.md) — 被动约束
